name: Space Dock 1
abilities: This unit's Production value is equal to 2 more than the resource value of this planet.
Up to 3 fighters in this system do not count against your ships' capacity.

name: War Sun
abilities: Other players' units in this system lose Planetary Shield.

name: Dreadnought II
abilities: This unit cannot be destroyed by "Direct Hit" action cards.

name: Fighter II
abilities: This unit may move without being transported. Fighters in excess of your ships' capacity count against your fleet pool.

name: PDS II
abilities: You may use this unit's Space Cannon against ships that are adjacent to this unit's system.

name: Infantry II
abilities: After this unit is destroyed, roll 1 die. If the result is 6 or greater, place the unit on this card. At the start of your next turn, place each unit that is on this card on a planet you control in your home system.

name: Space Dock II
abilities: This unit's Production value is equal to 4 more than the resource value of this planet.
Up to 3 fighters in this system do not count against your ships' capacity.

name: Genesis
abilities: At the end of the status phase, place 1 infantry from your reinforcements in this system's space area.

name: Fourth Moon
abilities: Other players' ships in this system cannot use Sustain Damage.

name: Van Hauge
abilities: When this ship is destroyed, destroy all ships in this system.

name: The Inferno
abilities: ACTION: Spend 1 token from your strategy pool to place 1 cruiser in this unit's system.

name: Prototype War Sun I
abilities: Other players' units in this system lose Planetary Shield.

name: Duha Menaimon
abilities: After you activate this system, you may produce up to 5 units in this system.
During a space combat, hits produced by this ship and by this ship and by your dreadnoughts in this system must be assigned to non-fighter ships if able.

name: Salai Sai Corian
abilities: When this unit makes a combat roll, it rolls a number of dice equal to the number of your opponent's non-fighter ships in this system.

name: The Alastor
abilities: At the start of a space combat, choose any number of your ground forces in this system to participate in that combat as if they were ships.

name: Matriarch
abilities: During an invasion in this system, you may commit fighters to planets as if they were ground forces. After combat, return those units to the space area.

name: Arc Secundus
abilities: Other players' units in this system lose Planetary Shield. At the start of each space combat round, repair this ship.

name: Floating Factory I
abilities: This unit is placed in a space area instead on a planet. This unit can move and retreat as if it were a ship. If this unit is blockaded, it is destroyed.

name: J.N.S. Hylarim
abilities: When making a combat roll for this ship, each result of 9 or 10, before applying modifiers, produces 2 additional hits.

name: Sardakk N'orr
abilities: Apply +1 to the result of each of your other ships combat rolls in this system.

name: Loncara Ssodu
abilities: You may use this unit's Space Cannon against ships that are in adjacent systems.

name: Y'sia Y'ssrila
abilities: This ship can move through systems that contain other players' ships.

name: Wrath Of Kenara
abilities: After you roll a die during a space combat in this system, you may spend 1 trade good to apply +1 to the result.

name: Hil Colish
abilities: This ship's system contains a delta wormhole. During movement, this ship may move before or after your other ships.

name: Arvicon Rex
abilities: During combat against an opponent whose command token is not in your fleet pool, apply +2 to the results of this unit's combat rolls.

name: Crimson Legionnaire I
abilities: After this unit is destroyed, gain 1 commodity or convert 1 of your commodities to a trade good.

name: Memoria I
abilities: You may treat this unit as if it were adjacent to systems that contain 1 or more of your mechs.

name: The Terror Between
abilities: Capture all other non-structure units that are destroyed in this system, including your own.

name: Dimensional Tear I
abilities: This system is a gravity rift; your ships do not roll for this gravity rift. Place a dimensional tear token beneath this unit as a reminder.
Up to 6 fighters in this system do not count against your ships' capacity.

name: Ouranos
abilities: DEPLOY: After you activate a system that contains 1 or more of your PDS, you may replace 1 of those PDS with this unit.

name: Hel-Titan I
abilities: This unit is treated as both a structure and a ground force. It cannot be transported.

name: Dynamo
abilities: After any player's unit in this system or an adjacent system uses Sustain Damage, you may spend 2 influence to repair that unit.

name: Visz El Vir
abilities: Your mechs in this system roll 1 additional die during combat.

name: Quetzecoatl
abilities: Other players cannot use Space Cannon against your ships in this system.

name: Starlancer
abilities: After a player whose command token is in your fleet pool activates this system, you may spend their token from your fleet pool to end their turn; they gain that token.

name: Crimson Legionnaire II
abilities: After this unit is destroyed, gain 1 commodity or convert 1 of your commodities to a trade good. Then, place the unit on this card. At the start of your next turn, place each unit that is on this card on a planet you control in your home system.

name: Strike Wing Alpha II
abilities: When this unit uses Anti-Fighter Barrage, each result of 9 or 10 also destroys 1 of your opponent's infantry in the space area of the active system.

name: Aerie Sentinel
abilities: This unit does not count against capacity if it is being transported or if it in a space area with 1 or more of your ships that have capacity values.

name: Mordred
abilities: During combat against an opponent who has an "X" or "Y" token on 1 or more of their technologies, apply +2 to the result of each of this unit's combat rolls.

name: Hecatoncheires
abilities: DEPLOY: When you would place a PDS on a planet, you may place 1 mech and 1 infantry on that planet instead.

name: Hel-Titan II
abilities: This unit is treated as both a structure and a ground force. It cannot be transported. You may use this unit's Space Cannon against ships that are adjacent to this unit's system.

name: Reanimator
abilities: When your infantry on this planet are destroyed, place them on your faction sheet; those units are captured.

name: Dimensional Tear II
abilities: This system is a gravity rift; your ships do not roll for this gravity rift. Place a dimensional tear token beneath this unit as a reminder.
Up to 12 fighters in this system do not count against your ships' capacity.

name: Ember Colossus
abilities: When you use your Star Forge faction ability in this system or an adjacent system, you may place 1 infantry from your reinforcements with this unit.

name: Prototype War Sun II
abilities: Other players' units in this system lose Planetary Shield.

name: Annihilator
abilities: While not participating in ground combat, this unit can use its Bombardment ability on planets in its system as if it were a ship.

name: Super-Dreadnought II
abilities: This unit cannot be destroyed by "Direct Hit" action cards.

name: Z-Grav Eidolon (Ground)
abilities: If this unit is in the space area of the active system at the start of a space combat, flip this card.

name: Z-Grav Eidolon (Space)
abilities: If this unit is in the space area of the active system, it is also a ship. At the end of a space battle in the active system, flip this card.

name: ZS Thunderbolt M2
abilities: After you use your Orbital Drop faction ability, you may spend 3 resources to place 1 mech on that planet

name: Spec Ops II
abilities: After this unit is destroyed, roll 1 die. If the result is 6 or greater, place the unit on this card. At the start of your next turn, place each unit that is on this card on a planet you control in your home system.

name: Scavenger Zeta
abilities: DEPLOY: After you gain control of a planet, you may spend 1 trade good to place 1 mech on that planet.

name: Floating Factory II
abilities: This unit is placed in a space area instead of on a planet. This unit can move and retreat as if it were a ship. If this unit is blockaded, it is destroyed.

name: Dunlain Reaper
abilities: DEPLOY: At the start of a round of ground combat, you may spend 2 resources to replace 1 of your infantry in that combat with 1 mech.

name: Shield Paling
abilities: Your infantry on this planet are not affected by your Fragile faction ability.

name: Moyin's Ashes
abilities: DEPLOY: When you use your Indoctrination faction ability, you may spend 1 additional influence to replace your opponent's unit with 1 mech instead of 1 infantry.

name: Pride Of Kenara
abilities: This planet's planet card may be traded as part of a transaction; if you do, move all of your units from this planet to another planet you control.

name: Reclaimer
abilities: After you resolve a tactical action during which you gained control of this planet, you may place 1 PDS or 1 space dock from your reinforcements on this planet.

name: Indomitus
abilities: You may use this unit's Space Cannon against ships that are in adjacent systems.

name: Blackshade Infiltrator
abilities: DEPLOY: After you use your Stall Tactics faction ability, you may place 1 mech on a planet you control.

name: Moll Terminus
abilities: Other players' ground forces on this planet cannot use Sustain Damage.

name: Quantum Manipulator
abilities: While this unit is in a space area during combat, you may use its Sustain Damage ability to cancel a hit that is produced against your ships in this system.

name: Watcher
abilities: You may remove this unit from a system that contains or is adjacent to another player's units to cancel an action card played by that player.

name: Valkyrie Exeskeleton
abilities: After this unit its Sustain Damage ability during ground combat, it produces 1 hit against your opponent's ground forces on this planet.

name: Icarus Drive
abilities: After any player activates a system, you may remove this unit from the game board to place or move a Creuss wormhole token into this system.

name: Letani Behemoth
abilities: DEPLOY: When you would use your Mitosis faction ability, you may replace 1 of your infantry with 1 mech from your reinforcements instead.

name: Iconoclast
abilities: During combat against an opponent who has at least 1 relic fragment, apply +2 to the results of this unit's combat rolls.

name: Letani Warrior II
abilities: After this unit is destroyed, roll 1 die. If the result is 6 or greater, place this unit on this card. At the start of your next turn, place each unit that is on this card on a planet you control in your home system.

name: Memoria II
abilities: You may treat this unit as if it were adjacent to systems that contain 1 or more of your mechs.

name: Hybrid Crystal Fighter II
abilities: This unit may move without being transported. Each fighter in excess of your ships' capacity counts as 1/2 of a ship against your fleet pool.

name: Exotrireme II
abilities: This unit cannot be destroyed by "Direct Hit" action cards. After a round of space combat, you may destroy this unit to destroy up to 2 ships in this system.
